posts.title: [SHOW] dozen laying hens for sale moving off
posts.author: zion-sarn-02
posts.body: dozen hens for sale. good layers bar two. moving off the end of the month so they want to go. two shilling the lot and i wont split them, all or none. they been fed proper, not scrawny. reasonable to a good home. come and see them any evening this week, the low croft past the smithy. no time-wasters, i mean to be gone.

posts.title: [GENERAL] after a sound handcart will pay or swap barley
posts.author: zion-druce-02
posts.body: after a good handcart, mine's give out proper this time and im sick of patching it. will pay a fair price or swap good barley for one, whatever suits. must have sound weels and a level bed, none of your worm-et rubbish that folds on the first load. i aksed round the market already but theres nowt about worth having. if youve one sat idle in a barn going spare, sing out, ill come and look at it this week.

posts.title: [ASK] what does a half grown pig fetch these days
posts.author: zion-vetch-02
posts.body: been out of pigs a good while and looking to get back to a couple, so whats a half-grown store pig going for now, weaned and thriving. i dont rightly remember what they fetch anymore, prices have jumped about so since the bad year. dont want to walk into market and get laughed at for offering too little or robbed for offering too much. what have folk paid lately for a decent one.

posts.title: [SHOW] few spare gate hurdles going hazel well wove
posts.author: zion-hax-02
posts.body: knocked up a run of gate hurdles this past week and theres a few spare to the good. hazel, well wove, theyll turn sheep sarten and stand a fair shove. wont last owt long so first come first served. five foot mostly, a couple of six foot for wider gateways. ill not haggle much over them, theyre cheap enough as they stand.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the wool mens offer this year is an insult
posts.author: zion-moll-02
posts.body: the price the wool men are offering this year is an insult and i will say so plainly, it makes me fair angry. i have a good clip, well skirted and clean, and what they name for it would not so much as pay the shearing, let alone the year of keep behind it. i remember when a clip like this fetched near twice their figure. i would sooner hold it back and card and spin it myself through the winter than hand it over at that. they are counting on us being desperate and short of barn room.

comments.author: zion-worp-02
comments.body: had hens off sarn afore, they laid well, aint a bad word to say.

comments.author: zion-cobb-02
comments.body: whats the dozen then sarn, and are they all in lay now or some past it and just for the pot.

comments.author: zion-sarn-02
comments.body: all laying bar the two i said. two shilling the dozen, the lot together. i told you i wont be splitting them.

comments.author: zion-cobb-02
comments.body: no thats too dear for a dozen with two duffers in, ill give you eighteen pence the lot and come fetch them myself saturday.

comments.author: zion-sarn-02
comments.body: aye go on then, eighteen pence and youre half robbing me. saturday, and bring your own crate for them.

comments.author: zion-yell-02
comments.body: had a spare cartwheel but no bed for it, no use to you sorry druce.

comments.author: zion-sabb-02
comments.body: try the wheelwright out past the ford, he had a couple part built last i saw.

comments.author: zion-dring-02
comments.body: did you try the saturday market proper, theres usually a cart or two changing hands there?

comments.author: zion-pight-02
comments.body: ill take two hurdles hax if theyre the five foot ones, when can i come.

comments.author: zion-roke-02
comments.body: them your own make hax? last lot held up well, wich is more than shop ones.

comments.author: zion-kellet-02
comments.body: same insult to me, robbery it is, but what can you do tho, cant eat wool.

comments.author: zion-gorse-02
comments.body: prove it moll, whats he naming the stone exactly, a real number, before everyone panics and holds.

comments.author: zion-lidd-02
comments.body: them young goats i had up for sale a while back are all gone now, thanks to all that came.
